productDisplayName: Nike Men's Ss Training Yellow T-shirt
description: CompositionYellow V- neck t-shirt made of 100% polyester, engineered with Dri-Fit technology, has a fabric tape detailing on inseam of the neckline, with short sleeves and black panels on the shoulder, nike swoosh printed on the right chest and back mesh panelsFittingRegularWash care Machine wash in cold water with like colours at 30 degree C Do not use softeners or bleach Remove immediately Do not allow to lay on itself when wet Tumble dry low Do not iron Do not dry clean Whether you are heating it up on the field or getting cosy on a weekend, this nike t-shirt will definitely get you noticed. Engineered with Nike's Dri-Fit technology, it wicks away sweat to keep you dry and comfortable on and off the court. Team it with tracks, shorts or jeans for the complete sporty look.
